title: Scale to at least 500 places across at least 5 locales; origin notes at least 200; maintain 100% consent+provenance
context: M3 scales the corpus to the shipped bar defined in PLAN.md: at least 500 places across at least 5 locales, origin notes on at least 200 entries, IPA/respelling on at least 90%, 100% consent+provenance maintained, and a fresh independent audit sample still returning at least 95% verified. All Indigenous/minority entries must be under a stewardship record or excluded. Depends on data-002 and origins-001.
objective: Expand the corpus to at least 500 places across at least 5 locales with origin notes on at least 200 entries, maintaining 100% consent+provenance, IPA/respelling on at least 90%, all Indigenous/minority entries under a stewardship record, and passing a fresh independent audit at at least 95%.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 500 distinct Place entries are in the corpus; all pass CI gates.
At least 5 distinct locales (BCP-47 language/region combinations) are represented.
Origin notes (OriginNote records) are present on at least 200 entries; each passes cultural/linguistic review.
IPA (narrow and/or broad) plus English respelling are present on at least 90% of all place entries.
100% of Recordings carry a complete, valid ConsentRecord and a resolvable provenance link; CI gate passes.
All Indigenous/minority-language entries are under a community-steward record; any without a steward are excluded.
A fresh independent audit of a stratified sample returns at least 95% verified for consent, license, and citation correctness.
Privacy/consent reviewer and cultural reviewer both sign off before the task is marked done.
output: Full corpus with at least 500 place entries across at least 5 locales and at least 200 origin notes, committed via PR with dual reviewer sign-off and fresh independent audit at at least 95%.
